# MONOCHROME

> Concept fashion e-commerce demo (portfolio project). A cinematic dark-themed
> store where every photo and video is AI-generated with Higgsfield.
> Orders are stored in Firestore for demo purposes; no payments are taken.

## Pages

- [Home](/): hero video and the new FW26 collection
- [Catalog](/catalog): 12 products with category/size/price filters in the URL
- [Lookbook](/lookbook): editorial campaign videos and stills
- [Product pages](/product/p01): sizes, related items, structured data (schema.org Product)

## Notes

- Source: https://github.com/M1rwana12/monochrome-store
- Stack: React 18, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion
